user_content: I'm planning to target people who have shown interest in similar products to mine, just like I did in my previous Facebook ad campaign, which reached around 2,000 people and resulted in 50 clicks to my website.

I'm planning to run another Facebook ad campaign soon, and I'd like to target people who have shown interest in similar products to mine. Can you give me some tips on how to effectively target my ad audience on Facebook?

I'm looking to run another Facebook ad campaign soon and I want to make sure I'm targeting the right audience. Can you help me identify the most effective targeting options for my business? By the way, my previous ad campaign, which ran for five days, reached around 2,000 people.

My business operates in the e-commerce niche, and I offer handmade home decor products. My ideal customer is a female between 25-45 years old who values unique, eco-friendly products. The goal of my previous campaign was to drive website traffic and increase brand awareness. My ad content was a high-quality image of one of my products with a brief description and a call-to-action to visit my website. The budget for my previous campaign was around $100, and the results were 50 clicks to my website, which I'm pretty happy with.

I've been using Instagram stories to give my followers a sneak peek into my production process, and to ask for their feedback on new products. I've also been experimenting with polls, like the one I did last week where I asked my followers to vote for their favorite product design. Around 50 people voted, which was a great response.

I'm trying to improve my Instagram engagement. Can you suggest some popular hashtags in my niche that I can use? By the way, I recently collaborated with an influencer who promoted my product to her 10,000 followers, and it was a great success.
I'm trying to organize my social media life, can you help me find a way to schedule my Instagram posts in advance?
